core_idea: R Corp. 4th Pack Rhino Meursault is a Tank / Status Specialist — **Charge** cycle — build Count toward **20**, spend on empowered skills (often **Rhino Ram**), then rebuild for the next window. Scaling conditions: At 10+ Charge, Coin Power +2.
playstyle_guide:
- **Charge Count** caps at **20** — build with lighter skills, dump stacks on empowered coins, then ramp back up for the next cycle.
- Stack **Charge Count** before offensive skills — this kit checks Charge and consumes stacks for large Coin Power and Clash Power spikes.
- Skills check **7+ Bleed** — favour those coins when stacked.
- Front-load **+3 Aggro** on the slot you want enemies to target.
- Pair high-Aggro turns with Guard or Assist Defense so passives trigger under pressure.
- Hold S3 for when At 10+ Charge Count is met — that condition is what unlocks its full damage ceiling.

**S1 — Weighty Bash** (BP 5, CP +6, x1): rolls — low 5, high 11 (Extremely Low / High stacked).
- Needs 10+ Charge Count to activate — prioritise building stacks before using.
- Gain +2 Charge Count

**S2 — Demolish** (BP 5, CP +3, x3): rolls — low 5, high 14 (Low).
- Peak output requires both conditions: At 7+ Speed, inflict +1 Bleed Count with this skill | [On Use] Gain +4 Charge Count.
- Gain +4 Charge Count

**S3 — Rhino Ram** (BP 6, CP +3, x3): rolls — low 6, high 15 (Low / Average stacked).
- Needs 10+ Charge Count to activate — prioritise building stacks before using.
- Inflict +1 Bleed Count; [On Hit] Spend 2 Charge Count; Inflict +1 Bleed Count; [On Hit] Spend 3 Charge Count; Inflict +1 Bleed Count

Combat passive — **Activate rrR-#4 Suit Pressurization**: At the end of the turn, gain +2 Max Speed per 5 Charge Count next turn. (Max 6).
  - At the start of the turn, if at 5+ Charge Count, gain 3 Aggro to this unit's rightmost slot.

Combat passive — **Maneuver Training**: At the end of the turn, 1 ally that has the highest Charge Count gains Max Speed +1 (Capped at 3) per 5 Charge Count next turn.

Defense skill — **Counter: Bioelectricity Induction**: [On Use] If attacked while shielded, gain +2 Charge Count (Max 10 per turn).

- **N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū**: 'It flows and cries' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
